message:
test(session): comprehensive coverage for compute_message_count_and_name and map_outcome

Adds 14 unit tests to src/session_sqlite.rs covering previously untested
paths in the session SQLite layer:

compute_message_count_and_name:
- Verifies non-message entry types (ModelChange, Label, Custom,
  Compaction, BranchSummary, ThinkingLevelChange) are correctly ignored
  when counting messages, while SessionInfo entries still extract names.
- Mixed entry type test with all variants interleaved.
- Large input test (1000 messages) for boundary validation.
- Name persistence test: name set by early SessionInfo entry survives
  subsequent message-only entries.

map_outcome:
- Outcome::Ok maps to Ok(value).
- Outcome::Err maps to Error::Session with descriptive message.
- Outcome::Cancelled maps to Error::Aborted.
- Panic propagation: Outcome::Err(Panic) maps to Error::Session
  containing "panicked".

SqliteSessionMeta struct:
- Field access with name present and absent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
